principal_diagnosis.description: COPD with acute lower respiratory infection

additional_diagnoses.description: Bacterial infection due to unspecified organism
additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: intravenous antibiotics for a presumed bacterial chest infection (no organism isolated)
additional_diagnoses.rationale: Required treatment (IV antibiotics); added under the 'code also' instruction on DX-RESP-001.

additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: managed on a sliding-scale (subcutaneous) insulin regimen with endocrine input
additional_diagnoses.rationale: Meets additional-diagnosis criteria: required active management (insulin) and monitoring this episode.

procedures.evidence_span: Required non-invasive ventilation (NIV) overnight on day 1

not_coded.reason: Documented in background but had no treatment, evaluation, monitoring or LOS impact this episode.

hard_cases_exercised: Additional dx that MEETS SCS-0002 (diabetes) vs one that FAILS it (osteoarthritis distractor)
'code also' instruction (infection) fired from the principal dx
Excludes: asthma (DX-RESP-005) must not be chosen over COPD exacerbation
